creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:

Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 353729)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -2,20 +2,23 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	lynx
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.7.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.8.8.1
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www ipv6
-MASTER_SITES=	http://lynx.isc.org/current/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://lynx.isc.org/current/ \
+		http://bitrote.org/distfiles/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:R}rel.${PORTVERSION:E}
 
 MAINTAINER=	jharris@widomaker.com
 COMMENT=	Non-graphical, text-based World-Wide Web client
 
-CONFLICTS=	lynx-2.8.[8-9]*
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
+CONFLICTS=	lynx-2.8.[8-9]d*
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_OPENSSL=	yes
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}2-8-7
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}2-8-8
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-zlib --libdir="${L_LIB}" \
 		--enable-nsl-fork --enable-persistent-cookies \
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo	(revision 353729)
+++ distinfo	(working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (lynx2.8.7rel.2.tar.bz2) = 301bda96ad3cd5032805e8d5315a42061a11e472e3d3a7baee3a2879517ef627
-SIZE (lynx2.8.7rel.2.tar.bz2) = 2436801
+SHA256 (lynx2.8.8rel.1.tar.bz2) = a25a1c74c8fe86ff332d8a85441d6155a842fef894d2ffb9ffd9f6457a754c02
+SIZE (lynx2.8.8rel.1.tar.bz2) = 2583698
Index: files/patch-makefile.in
===================================================================
--- files/patch-makefile.in	(revision 353729)
+++ files/patch-makefile.in	(working copy)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 Index: makefile.in
-@@ -388,7 +388,9 @@
+@@ -433,7 +433,9 @@
  	else \
  		cp $(srcdir)/lynx.cfg $(SYSCONFDIR)/lynx.tmp ; \
  	fi'
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
  	@ECHO_CC@sed	-e '/^HELPFILE:http/s!^!#!' \
  		-e '/^#HELPFILE:file/s!#!!' \
  		$(SYSCONFDIR)/lynx.tmp | \
-@@ -396,9 +398,11 @@
+@@ -441,9 +443,11 @@
  	$(SHELL) $(scripts_dir)/cfg_path.sh lynx_doc  $(helpdir) | \
  	sed	-e '/^HELPFILE:file/s!$$!$(COMPRESS_EXT)!' \
  		-e '/^HELPFILE:file/s!$(COMPRESS_EXT)$(COMPRESS_EXT)$$!$(COMPRESS_EXT)!' \
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@
  
  LYHelp.h : help_files.sed $(srcdir)/LYHelp.hin
  	@echo Creating $@
-@@ -420,17 +424,17 @@
+@@ -465,17 +469,17 @@
  	$(SHELL) -c 'SHELL=$(SHELL) $(SHELL) $(scripts_dir)/cfg_defs.sh $(srcdir)'
  
  install-cfg : $(SYSCONFDIR)
@@ -37,8 +37,8 @@
  
  uninstall ::
  @MSG_DIR_MAKE@	cd $(PO_DIR) && $(MAKE_RECUR) uninstall
- 	-rm -f $(BINDIR)/lynx$x
- 	-rm -f $(MANDIR)/lynx.1
+ 	-rm -f $(BINDIR)/$(binary_PROG)
+ 	-rm -f $(MANDIR)/$(actual_PROG).1
 -	-rm -f $(SYSCONFDIR)/lynx.cfg
 -	-rm -f $(SYSCONFDIR)/lynx.lss
 +	-rm -f $(SYSCONFDIR)/lynx.cfg.sample
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----
Version: GnuPG v1
How-To-Repeat: 	Apply patch below.
